name: Focaccia-w/sun-Dried Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients except the tomatoes and Parmesan cheese in the machine.
2. Program for Raisin Bread, Basic Bread, Basic Wheat, Basic White, or White/Whole Grain.
3. Press Start or On.
4. Add the chopped sun-dried tomatoes and grated Parmesan cheese when the beeper sounds or during the last 5 minutes of the final knead cycle.
This is the recipe for the Large Oster, West Bend, Large Pillsbury and Large Zo. Tested by Reggie Dwork (reggie@reggie.com).
